project.name: platvision-id
project.currentFocus: Dockerized Flask ALPR demo with visible localization, OCR crop preview, Ultralytics YOLO adapter, PaddleOCR adapter, demo fallback, and optional South Sumatra/BG tax lookup.
durableFacts: Runtime is Python Flask with a feature-oriented ALPR module under src/platvision_id/modules/alpr.
Docker is the recommended demo path because YOLO/PyTorch/PaddleOCR/PaddlePaddle dependencies are heavy.
The app prefers models/best.pt when present and otherwise uses a controlled demo fallback crop instead of depending on generic YOLO downloads.
The Docker ML lane pins paddleocr==3.3.3 with paddlepaddle==3.2.0 to avoid a Paddle CPU oneDNN runtime failure seen with newer PaddlePaddle.
Optional tax lookup is enabled by PLATVISION_ENABLE_TAX_LOOKUP; BG plates use the official Bapenda Sumsel page, while known captcha/app-based regions return manual official source links.

lastAchievements: Initialized the local git repository, configured the local author as fatidaprilian, and pushed main to git@github.com:fatidaprilian/platvision-id.git.
Created required project docs, API contract, design contract, Flask app scaffold, ALPR pipeline adapters, UI, tests, Dockerfile, compose.yaml, and Docker runbook.
Split Docker lanes into development, production, and lightweight test targets; built all three images successfully.

Fixed the image recognition 500 error by pinning compatible OCR dependencies, returning UNREADABLE instead of crashing on OCR runtime failure, and using demo fallback when no trained YOLO plate model exists.
Added API cropPreview support plus browser bounding-box overlay and plate-crop inspection for clearer demo feedback.
Improved DemoFallbackDetector from a fixed center-lower crop to a plate-like bright-region heuristic with fixed-crop fallback.
Added YOLO training scaffold: datasets/platvision-id.yaml, dataset workspace placeholders, training docs, and platvision-train-detector CLI that copies the trained best weights to models/best.pt.
Added optional Bapenda Sumsel tax lookup and manual official source links for selected regions to the ALPR service, API response, UI result panel, docs, and tests.
pendingIssues: The trained detector exists locally at models/best.pt; keep it local unless the repo intentionally tracks model artifacts.
nextBestActions: Refresh the browser at http://localhost:5000 and confirm BG lookup now shows owner/address as Not provided when the official source omits them.
Record model training metrics from Colab output in docs/training/dataset-notes.md or a future evaluation report.
If the app is ever deployed, revisit the tax lookup privacy policy before showing owner or address fields.
